hooks.command: AI_AGENT=1 bash -c 'FILE=$(jq -r .tool_input.file_path); case "$FILE" in *.ts|*.tsx|*.astro) npx eslint --fix --quiet "$FILE";; esac'
AI_AGENT=1 bash -c 'FILE=$(jq -r .tool_input.file_path); case "$FILE" in */src/lib/routes.ts|*/src/pages/*) npx vitest run src/__tests__/route-coverage.test.ts || exit 2;; esac'
